message:
Fix concurrent duplicate hang when response not cached

Problem:
When a response isn't cached (5xx status), concurrent duplicate requests
waiting on pendingRequests promise would hang forever because the
promise was never resolved or rejected.

Fix:
When response is not cached (shouldCache = false), explicitly reject
the pending promise with an error explaining why.

Affected scenarios:
- 5xx server errors (not cached per idempotency best practices)
- Any status outside 2xx and 4xx range

Concurrent duplicates now:
1. Receive rejection from the pending promise
2. Catch block triggers "proceed with new attempt" path
3. Make their own request instead of hanging

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
